allow: Bash(node -e "const stub = { nodes: { createNode: \(\) => {}, registerType: \(n\) => console.log\('registered:', n\) } }; require\('./vallox/99-vallox.js'\)\(stub\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const lines=fs.readFileSync\('vallox/vallox.js','utf8'\).split\('\\n'\);for\(let i=121;i<=125;i++\){const l=lines[i-1];const cps=Array.from\(l\).map\(c=>c.codePointAt\(0\).toString\(16\)\).filter\(h=>parseInt\(h,16\)>127\);console.log\(i, JSON.stringify\(l\), 'non-ASCII codepoints:', cps\);}")
